Class ServerSocketProxy

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket.ServerSocketProxy
All Implemented Interfaces:
ServerRemoteInterface, Remote
public class ServerSocketProxy extends Object implements ServerRemoteInterface
Client-side proxy that implements ServerRemoteInterface over a Socket connection. Each call is serialized as a ClientToServerMessage and sent to the server, allowing the client to treat Socket and RMI connections identically.

All writes go through the private send(ClientToServerMessage) helper, which synchronizes on the output stream to prevent concurrent writes from corrupting the stream and calls ObjectOutputStream.reset() to prevent Java's object-reference cache from sending stale data.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ServerSocketProxy(ObjectOutputStream out, ClientVirtualView clientHandler)
    Creates a new proxy that forwards calls to the server via the given output stream.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addPlayer(PlayerDTO playerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Sends a request to add the player to the current lobby.
    void
    askForRank(String playerNumber, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Sends the global leaderboard request to the server for the given player count.
    void
    createGame(PlayerDTO playerHost, int PlayerNumber, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Sends a request to create a new game.
    void
    joinGameLoaded(PlayerDTO player, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Sends a request to join a game that is already being loaded.
    void
    loadGame(PlayerDTO player, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Sends a request to load a saved game to the server.
    void
    ping(PlayerDTO player)
    Sends a heartbeat ping to the server so it knows this client is still alive.
    void
    placingPlayer(PlayerDTO playerToPlace, int position)
    Sends a placing-player request to the server.
    void
    playerDoNothing(PlayerDTO playerDTO)
    Sends a request indicating the player skips their turn.
    void
    selectCardFromBottomList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Sends a request to draw a card from the bottom market list.
    void
    selectCardFromTopList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Sends a request to draw a card from the top market list.
    void
    selectExtraCard(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Sends a request to draw an extra card and blocks until the server confirms success or sends back an error.
    void
    skipExtraDraw(PlayerDTO player)
    Sends a skip-extra-draw request: the player declines the bonus draw without selecting any card.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • ServerSocketProxy

      public ServerSocketProxy(ObjectOutputStream out, ClientVirtualView clientHandler)
      Creates a new proxy that forwards calls to the server via the given output stream.
      Parameters:
      out - the output stream connected to the server socket.
      clientHandler - the local client view used to wait for server confirmations.

  • Method Details

    • ping

      public void ping(PlayerDTO player) throws RemoteException
      Sends a heartbeat ping to the server so it knows this client is still alive.
      Specified by:
      ping in interface ServerRemoteInterface
      Parameters:
      player - the calling player (identifies the sender to the server).
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • placingPlayer

      public void placingPlayer(PlayerDTO playerToPlace, int position) throws RemoteException, IndexOutOfBoundsException, TileOccupiedException
      Sends a placing-player request to the server.
      Specified by:
      placingPlayer in interface ServerRemoteInterface
      Parameters:
      playerToPlace - the player who is placing.
      position - the tile position chosen.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the position is out of range.
      TileOccupiedException - if the tile is already occupied.

    • selectCardFromTopList

      public void selectCardFromTopList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position) throws RemoteException, IndexOutOfBoundsException, NotEnoughFoodException, NotSelectableCardException, EmptyMarketException, ActionNotAvailable
      Sends a request to draw a card from the top market list.
      Specified by:
      selectCardFromTopList in interface ServerRemoteInterface
      Parameters:
      player - the acting player.
      cardType - the type of card to draw.
      position - the position in the top list.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the position is out of range.
      NotEnoughFoodException - if the player cannot afford the card.
      NotSelectableCardException - if the card type cannot be selected.
      EmptyMarketException - if the row has no selectable cards.
      ActionNotAvailable - if it is not this player's turn.

    • selectCardFromBottomList

      public void selectCardFromBottomList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException, NotEnoughFoodException, NotSelectableCardException, EmptyMarketException, RemoteException
      Sends a request to draw a card from the bottom market list.
      Specified by:
      selectCardFromBottomList in interface ServerRemoteInterface
      Parameters:
      player - the acting player.
      cardType - the type of card to draw.
      position - the position in the bottom list.
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the position is out of range.
      NotEnoughFoodException - if the player cannot afford the card.
      NotSelectableCardException - if the card type cannot be selected.
      EmptyMarketException - if the row has no selectable cards.
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • selectExtraCard

      public void selectExtraCard(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position) throws RemoteException, IndexOutOfBoundsException, NotEnoughFoodException, NotSelectableCardException, EmptyMarketException
      Sends a request to draw an extra card and blocks until the server confirms success or sends back an error.
      Specified by:
      selectExtraCard in interface ServerRemoteInterface
      Parameters:
      player - the acting player.
      cardType - the type of card to draw.
      position - the position in the list.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the position is out of range.
      NotEnoughFoodException - if the player cannot afford the card.
      NotSelectableCardException - if the card type cannot be selected.
      EmptyMarketException - if the row has no selectable cards.

    • playerDoNothing

      public void playerDoNothing(PlayerDTO playerDTO) throws Exception
      Sends a request indicating the player skips their turn.
      Specified by:
      playerDoNothing in interface ServerRemoteInterface
      Parameters:
      playerDTO - the player who does nothing.
      Throws:
      Exception - if an unexpected error occurs.

    • skipExtraDraw

      public void skipExtraDraw(PlayerDTO player) throws RemoteException
      Sends a skip-extra-draw request: the player declines the bonus draw without selecting any card.
      Specified by:
      skipExtraDraw in interface ServerRemoteInterface
      Parameters:
      player - the player declining the extra draw.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • addPlayer

      public void addPlayer(PlayerDTO playerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface) throws RemoteException, GameFullException, GameReadyToStartException, NameOrColorAlreadyTakenException
      Sends a request to add the player to the current lobby. The clientRemoteInterface is not serialized — the server already has the socket reference.
      Specified by:
      addPlayer in interface ServerRemoteInterface
      Parameters:
      playerDTO - the player joining the game.
      clientRemoteInterface - ignored for socket transport.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.
      GameFullException - if the lobby is already at capacity.
      GameReadyToStartException - if this player fills the last slot (game will start).
      NameOrColorAlreadyTakenException - if the nickname or totem color is already in use.

    • createGame

      public void createGame(PlayerDTO playerHost, int PlayerNumber, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface) throws RemoteException, IllegalStateException
      Sends a request to create a new game. The clientRemoteInterface is not serialized — the server already has the socket reference.
      Specified by:
      createGame in interface ServerRemoteInterface
      Parameters:
      playerHost - the hosting player.
      PlayerNumber - the required number of players.
      clientRemoteInterface - ignored for socket transport.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.
      IllegalStateException - if a lobby already exists.

    • askForRank

      public void askForRank(String playerNumber, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface) throws RemoteException
      Sends the global leaderboard request to the server for the given player count. The clientRemoteInterface is not serialized — the server already uses the existing socket connection to reply.
      Specified by:
      askForRank in interface ServerRemoteInterface
      Parameters:
      playerNumber - the number of players in the just-finished game (as a string).
      clientRemoteInterface - ignored for socket transport.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if sending the message fails.

    • loadGame

      public void loadGame(PlayerDTO player, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface) throws RemoteException, GameAlreadyLoadedException, NoGameToLoadException
      Sends a request to load a saved game to the server. The clientRemoteInterface is not serialized.
      Specified by:
      loadGame in interface ServerRemoteInterface
      Parameters:
      player - the DTO of the first player initiating the load.
      clientRemoteInterface - ignored for socket transport.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if sending the message fails.
      GameAlreadyLoadedException - if a game is already being loaded.
      NoGameToLoadException - if there is no saved game to load.

    • joinGameLoaded

      public void joinGameLoaded(PlayerDTO player, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface) throws RemoteException, IllegalStateException, GameReadyToStartException
      Sends a request to join a game that is already being loaded. The clientRemoteInterface is not serialized.
      Specified by:
      joinGameLoaded in interface ServerRemoteInterface
      Parameters:
      player - the DTO of the player rejoining the saved game.
      clientRemoteInterface - ignored for socket transport.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if sending the message fails.
      IllegalStateException - if the server state does not allow the operation.
      GameReadyToStartException - if the last required player has just joined.
